name: GOLFTEC Spring Valley
address: 6255 S Durango Dr Suite 111-112, Las Vegas, NV 89113
about: GOLFTEC Spring Valley is a professional golf training studio focused on data-driven improvement. The center offers personalized lessons using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors to analyze swings. Services include individual coaching, club fitting, and practice memberships, all aimed at providing clear feedback and a structured path for golfers to enhance their skills. The facility provides a controlled indoor environment with a proven system for players of all skill levels to achieve better performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion measurement technology
Personalized game plans and coaching tailored to individual goals
Club fitting services that add an average of 21 more yards off the tee
High-tech training bays with launch monitors and video feedback
Pro shop offering gear at 10% off retail prices

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor used for club and ball data analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or try equipment available at the facility. GOLFTEC also offers custom club fitting services where you can be fitted for and purchase new clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned as available services. The focus is on golf instruction and practice, not a dining experience.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify a time for an 18-hole simulator session, as GOLFTEC primarily offers lessons, fittings, and practice sessions rather than full simulated rounds.

faq.question: Is this location kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While GOLFTEC offers programs for junior golfers, the content does not specify child-friendly amenities, suggesting it is a more serious, tech-focused training environment.
